title: AmongstReality's Bow
description: Little resource pack that changes bow, so it looks a bit better.
body:
![amongstreality's bow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/71v84f5G/images/0fbb3ee3c4c1a540517f939c93a65f071ada695b.png)

A small resource pack that changes the bow, so it looks a bit better.

Inspired by keno's [SammyFault](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qznC7JCkwHA).

### You can support me and my projects here
